mnemonics.title: LIO - Leaf Input Output
mnemonics.content: Leaves are Input Operands - Remember that leaf nodes always contain operands (inputs), while internal nodes contain operators that produce outputs.

mnemonics.title: PPS Traversal Order
mnemonics.content: Postfix = Postorder, Prefix = Preorder, (Infix = Inorder) - The type of notation matches the type of traversal needed to produce it.

mnemonics.title: SOP - Stack Operands Push
mnemonics.content: When building from Postfix: See Operand? Push it! See Operator? Pop two, make children, Push new node.

mnemonics.title: LER - Leaf Evaluate Return
mnemonics.content: For evaluation: if Leaf, Evaluate and Return value; if Operator, Evaluate Left, Evaluate Right, then apply Operator.
